question.text:
Dear Kieran,
Pls confirm my understanding:
IDJKT office under SAIID :

This one is requested for IDBLW office

Thanks


🧧  Holiday Notice 🏮✨

February 16 - 17, 2026 | Chinese New Year 2577 Kongzili


Best Regards,


Henny Cut Irnawati

Traffic and Document Manager - GENA

PT Samudera Agencies Indonesia

Letjen S. Parman St No.Kav. 35, Kemanggisan, Palmerah, West Jakarta City, Jakarta 11480, Indonesia

p: (021) 5300580 ext 87271

m: +6282110291033

e: henny.irnawati@samudera.id <mail


On Fri, Feb 13, 2026 at 3:29 PM Kieran Ji/CUL-CN/IT <kieranji@culines.com <mailto:kieranji@culin
